creator: Karli.Sjoberg@slu.se
text:
(In reply to lukas.slebodnik from comment #7)
Yes, it´s compiled with SAMBA support:
# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for sssd-1.11.7_4
_OPTIONS_READ=sssd-1.11.7_4
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=DOCS SMB
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=DOCS
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=SMB

And yes, you can certainly see logs, I have provided "sssd-logs-(centos|freebsd|ubuntu).tar.gz" files uploaded in the bug report with sssd set with "debug_level = 9" so you at least won´t be seeing too little information:)

(In reply to Jan Bramkamp from comment #5)
I am still in the process of trying to get it working but there have been some hurdles along the way. Now it feels like everything is set up and configured correctly but sssd.conf fails to be generated. I believe it´s a bug that I will report in the FreeNAS bug tracker instead.
